Who I Am

About Me

My Story

I am a dedicated and detail-oriented bookkeeper based in Lahore, Pakistan. I specialise in helping small and medium-sized businesses maintain accurate, compliant, and insightful financial records using QuickBooks, Xero, and Microsoft Excel.

My mission is simple: free business owners from the stress of messy books so they can focus on growing their business.

🏢 SNS Accountancy Pvt. Ltd.  |  1+ Year Experience

Tools & Platforms

QuickBooks Online QuickBooks Desktop Xero Microsoft Excel Bank Reconciliation Financial Reporting Payroll Processing Cash Flow Management

What I Do

My Services

📒

Full-Cycle Bookkeeping

Recording every income and expense transaction accurately in QuickBooks or Xero, keeping your ledger always up-to-date and audit-ready.

🏦

Bank & Card Reconciliation

Matching your bank statements against your books to catch errors, duplicates, or missing transactions — 100% accuracy every month.

📊

Financial Statements

Preparing clear P&L statements, Balance Sheets, and Cash Flow reports so you have the numbers to make smart business decisions.

💼

Accounts Payable & Receivable

Tracking what you owe and what you're owed — managing invoices, bills, and aging reports to keep cash flow healthy.

🧹

Catch-Up & Clean-Up

Bringing months (or years) of backlogged or messy books up to date quickly and accurately.

💰

Payroll Processing

Calculating wages, deductions, and ensuring payroll records align perfectly with your accounting entries.

📂

QuickBooks & Xero Setup

Setting up chart of accounts, connecting bank feeds, and configuring your accounting software from scratch.

📈

Tax-Ready Reporting

Organising your books so your accountant has everything they need — saving you time and professional fees at tax season.
